title: NotifyNYCSubscription
description: A resident's subscription to Notify NYC emergency alerts — the everyday NYCEM transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public write API for enrolling. Today a resident subscribes only through the rented Everbridge Member Portal (a858-nycnotify.nyc.gov), by texting a keyword, or by phone to 311. This schema serves both the read surface (get a resident's own subscription) and the SubscriptionRequest write surface (subscribe to alerts by channel, location, and category).

subscriptionId.description: Server-assigned subscription identifier (Everbridge member id). Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Subscription lifecycle status. Set by NYCEM/Everbridge, not the subscriber.

phone.description: Mobile number for SMS / voice alerts.

channels.description: How the subscriber wants to receive alerts.

languagePreference.description: Preferred alert language (Notify NYC delivers in ~14 languages).

locations.description: Locations to receive geographically-scoped alerts for (home, work, family).

categories.description: Alert categories to subscribe to; omit for all. Mirrors the CAP feed categories.

evacuationZoneAlerts.description: Whether to receive coastal-storm / hurricane evacuation-zone orders for the subscriber's locations.
